product.name: Trial Reel Machine

pricing.notes: Unlimited reel generations, access to viral video library, AI-powered hooks/descriptions, strategic hashtags, live preview, one-click copy, history, favorites.

product.tagline: Generate Instagram Trial Reel Content in Seconds

icp.primary: Instagram influencers and creators with established audiences who need to scale content output
secondary: Coaches and course creators leveraging Instagram for growth
Brands with social media managers focused on Instagram reels
pain_points: Need for fast, high-performing trial reels without burning time
Uncertainty about which hooks and angles will resonate
Desire to maintain profile aesthetics while testing new ideas

positioning.category: AI-powered Instagram Trial Reel content generator
positioning.primary_benefit: Rapidly ship and test multiple trial reels to grow followers and revenue
differentiators: Only platform dedicated specifically to Instagram Trial Reels
Generates five smart variations per idea with strategic hashtags
Includes live Instagram-style previews and viral video library

competitors.name: Generic AI copy tools
competitors.differentiation: Trial Reel Machine focuses on Instagram Trial Reels with live previews and video assets while general copy tools lack reel-specific workflows.

features: Live Instagram-style preview with one-click copy
Audience targeting inputs and creative direction guidance
voice: Concise, personable, confident without being salesy
